rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY MARQUEZ VS. PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's demurrer is continued on the court's own motion to June 4, 2015. Plaintiff failed to deliver a courtesy copy of his opposition to the Court. Plaintiff must deliver one to Department 503 by May 27, 2015. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY MARQUEZ VS. PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's motion for relief is continued on the court's own motion to June 4, 2015. Plaintiff failed to deliver a courtesy copy of his motion to the Court. Plaintiff must deliver one to Department 503 by May 27, 2015. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY MARQUEZ VS. PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pac Operating Limited Partnerships Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant PAC Operating Limited Partnership's motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint is continued on the court's own motion to June 4, 2015. Plaintiff failed to deliver a courtesy copy of his opposition to the Court. Plaintiff must deliver one to Department 503 by May 27, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
